author: GoCodeAlone
description: Microsoft Azure infrastructure provider: ACI, AKS, SQL, Redis, VNet, LB, DNS, ACR, APIM, NSG, MSI, Blob Storage, App Service Certificates
name: workflow-plugin-azure

required_secrets.description: Azure AD app (service principal) client ID for DefaultAzureCredential. Referenced as ${AZURE_CLIENT_ID}.
required_secrets.name: AZURE_CLIENT_ID

required_secrets.description: Azure AD app client secret. Referenced as ${AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET}.
required_secrets.name: AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET

required_secrets.description: Azure AD tenant ID. Referenced as ${AZURE_TENANT_ID}.
required_secrets.name: AZURE_TENANT_ID

required_secrets.description: Azure subscription ID for IaC operations. Referenced as ${AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID}.
required_secrets.name: AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID
